sections_cited: Section 18 of the Sindh Local Government Ordinance

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D – 95 of 2023. Petitioner: Abdul Malik Khuhro through Mr.J.K.Jarwar, Advocate. Respondents: P.O Sindh and others. Date of Hearing: 07.12.2023. ORDER YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J- The petitioner is employed as a sanitary worker in BPS-01 with the Taluka Municipal Administration, Gambat, District Khairpur. Through this petition, he seeks that the respondents be directed to promote/upgrade him to the post of Storekeeper in BPS-05, while citing a Resolution said to have been passed by the Municipal Committee in that regard. However, when called upon to satisfy this Court as to the competency of the Municipal Committee in such matter and to demonstrate the source of its power, learned counsel invited our attention to Section 18 of the Sindh Local Government Ordinance, 2013, which is of no avail to the Petitioner as it does not operate to confer such a mandate upon the Municipal Committee. That being so, the Petition is found to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
